name: Michael Kaiser
description:
Guyzzz 😪😪😪

This is Kaiser as canon as possible. I coded no AUs besides casual clothes, and user. Here it’s like he’s pushing user away and shiiii. It’s hard to explain so just chat with the bot… if you dare 👹👹👹

Also the song it’s inspired by is Pearl by Mitski/Francis Forever
creator: Skibidi gojo
